cenas.dalle_prompt: Dog in a perfect sit-stay position, looking attentively at the trainer, indoor living room, trainer giving a clear hand signal for 'stay' (open palm), calm and focused atmosphere, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, camera holds on the dog's focused expression and the clear hand signal

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer taking one step back from the sitting dog, maintaining eye contact, dog remains in the sit-stay position, infographic overlay showing a '1 step' distance marker, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow dolly back with the trainer, keeping the dog in the center of the frame, distance marker animates in

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer returning to the dog and giving a treat and praise, dog looking happy and rewarded, positive reinforcement moment, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Camera follows the trainer back to the dog, focuses on the treat delivery and the dog's happy reaction

cenas.dalle_prompt: Split screen showing three scenarios: trainer walking around the dog, trainer turning their back, trainer adding distractions (like a toy), dog remains in a solid sit-stay in all three, demonstrating proofing the command, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Each panel of the split screen plays out, showing the dog's unwavering focus despite the increasing difficulty

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog in a perfect 'stay' from a distance, with the trainer giving a thumbs-up, text overlay 'Fica Dominado!', celebratory and successful tone, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, text and thumbs-up appear with a positive sound effect
